svg.title: FinTech data platform ecosystem — upstream sources, your role as data engineer, and downstream consumers
svg.desc: Diagram showing Alpha Vantage and FMP as upstream APIs feeding into a data lake and Databricks pipeline managed by the data engineer, with downstream consumers including analysts, quants, and dashboards.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Alpha Vantage data')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about FMP data')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the data lake Bronze layer?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the Bronze layer?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the Silver layer?')
sendPrompt('What is in the Gold layer star schema?')
sendPrompt('What does a BI analyst do with Gold data?')
sendPrompt('What does a quant analyst do with Gold data?')
sendPrompt('What kind of dashboard would use Gold data?')
